features: 【5 Layer Creative Explosion Gift Box】 This explosion gift box features a unique five-layer design, each layer accommodating a variety of small gifts, such as snacks, necklaces, watches, rings, photos, messages, gift certificates, and more. Each time you open the box, it unfolds like a flower, revealing one surprise after another, giving the recipient a unique experience! Perfect for birthdays, Valentine's Day, anniversaries, weddings, Christmas, Thanksgiving, and more!

【High Quality】 The explosion box is made of high-quality paper for a stable structure. It comes with a beautiful DIY kit: five matching bows, a matching ribbon, and a roll of double-sided tape. Unleash your imagination to create personalized gift box and create a thoughtful, one-of-a-kind surprise gift for your loved one!

【Large Capacity】 The surprise box measures 23 x 23 x 16 cm (9.1 inches x 9.1 inches x 6.3 inches), offering ample space for a variety of gifts, such as candy, chocolate, jewelry, cosmetics, or small toys, etc. The three-dimensional effect created when the gift box is unfolded makes the layered storage even more visually appealing, creating a memorable moment! (Note: The gift box requires assembly; snacks and gifts are not included.)

【Easy to Assemble】The gift boxes is easy to assemble. Follow the provided step-by-step instructions for a simple DIY experience. Unleash your imagination and creativity to transform the box into a true work of art! A surprising, one-of-a-kind gift!

【Preferred Gift Box】 Whether it's a birthday, Valentine's Day, an anniversary, Thanksgiving, or Christmas, this gift box is a perfect choice! Each layer of the gift box reflects your thoughtfulness and romance, making your gift a one-of-a-kind present. Give it to your family, friends, girlfriend, boyfriend, coworker, and more, and they'll be delighted and touched!
